title: ELFORDSON Gaming Chair with 8-Point Massage LED Light, Computer Office Chair with Footrest 82cm High Back 150° Recliner, PU Leather, Black
features: 【LIGHT UP YOUR GAME】 With 12 customized colours RGB LED light up to 366 modes, the ELFORDSON gaming chair (Marc series) provides a unique glow to your gaming setup. Finished in exquisite PU leather, wrapped with resilient foam paddings inside, the stylish PC chair is a true rewards for game lovers.

【UPGRADED 8-POINT MASSAGE】 Equipped with 8-point massage & 5 massage modes, ELFORDSON racing chairs help you reduce muscle fatigue and strain that can result from long hours of gaming and thus double up perfectly as a home office chair for heavy-duty WFH executives.

【MULTI-FUNCTIONS】 With detachable neck and lumbar support, back recliner between 90°-150° with built-in footrest, your gaming, working and relaxing needs can all be satisfied. 82cm-tall back, up to 44cm seat height and 360° swivel castors fits your gaming desk or workstation. An exclusive choice for home gaming or work.

【STURDY CONSTRUCTION】 Constructs a stylish nylon base with TUV certified castors, Intertek approved faux leather, SGS approved Gas-Lift system and tilt function can weight up to 180kg delivering absolute five-star luxury.
【100% SATISFACTION SERVICE 】 This extra large gaming desk chair covers a 2-year-warranty. Please feel free to contact ELFORDSON technical support, we will reply to you within 24 hours.
description: Product Description Previous page Next page 1 Light up your game 2 Dynamic ergonomics 3 Innovative slide armrests 4 90°-150° recliner 5 Extra-large gaming chair No compromise on materials Quality universal castors, a smoothy experience Upgraded reinforced steel base Thickness: 2.3mm SGS-certified gas lift Heavy-duty nylon base Whole-piece molding foam An elite in quality and design, your solution to true comfort ELFORDSON Gaming Chair - Marc Series Maximum weight capacity 180kg Assembly Assembly required Package 1x Manual instruction; 1x Chair Note (i) All measurements are made manually with a possible deviation of 1-3 cm. Note (ii) Due to the screen and lighting configuration, the colours may be slightly darker or lighter. Note (iii) Armrests assembly instruction: Use a screwdriver to poke into the slanted nuts to straighten the nut, and then fasten the screw again. Previous page Next page 1 Marc series 2 Xavier series 3 Elite series
